scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web & bun run dev:admin & wait
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:web && bun run build:admin
scripts.db:init: bash scripts/setup-db.sh && cd packages/server && bunx prisma db push --skip-generate && echo '✅ Schema 同步完成'
scripts.db:reset: bash -c 'mysql -u root ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:+-p$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD} -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS zqcms"' && bun run db:init && bun run db:seed
scripts.db:push: cd packages/server && bunx prisma db push
scripts.setup: bun install && bun run db:generate && bun run db:init && bun run db:seed
